# Jira Add Comment

## API Call: `add_comment`

### Parameters

| Parameter | Value |
|---|---|
| **Issue Key** | *(the key returned by create_issue)* |

### Comment Body

---

Feature created from user-provided definition covering all 9 template sections:

1. Feature Overview
2. Background and Strategic Fit
3. Goals
4. Requirements
5. Non-Functional Requirements
6. Use Cases (UC-1: Receive advisory notification)
7. Customer Considerations
8. Customer Information/Supportability
9. Documentation Considerations

---
